snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: macOS Home Voice E2.04 and native titlebar exact-candidate review
reviewers.independence: Development froze the exact 35-path H candidate after full, helper and package evidence; UI Design reproduced the identity and accepted the exact UI/macOS screenshots. Planning changed only existing owner, acceptance, semantic and review artifacts.

dimensions.summary: Owners locate the exact Home microphone session, body-free recovery, native helper/package evidence and macOS titlebar geometry without mixing the separate onboarding request.
PRD, API, architecture, settings, I18N, security and release owners agree on one sender-bound typed speech session, no durable/audio boundary and fixed permission recovery.
PIGE-CAP-003/E2.04 planned targets now name the exact macOS evidence and open platform/signing work; semantic lock v3/1,228 preserves every status.
The exact candidate has focused 8/133, full 119 passed/1 skipped files and 1,375 passed/1 skipped tests, typecheck/build/helper smoke and arm64 package/distribution evidence.
No document or status is added; owner updates reuse existing paths and semantic-neutral compression keeps all five fixed leanness budgets green.

verification.evidence: The exact combined candidate passes docs, decisions, UI visual, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

Focus 8/133, full 119 passed/1 skipped files and 1,375 passed/1 skipped tests, typecheck/build/native helper smoke and macOS arm64 package plus fresh-distribution smoke pass; exact 05b31b62/a296cfea identities are independently accepted.

verification.command: npm run verify:ui-visual && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The visual contract covers the integrated 58px macOS titlebar; semantic lock v3/1,228 and CON-001 through CON-004 pass with every status unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass within the fixed entry, trace and governed Markdown budgets.

coordination.taskTitle: Home Voice E2.04 and macOS titlebar alignment
coordination.compatibility: The candidate adds one strict local macOS speech session/helper and exact titlebar alignment without Job, source, model, vault, backup, Broker, hidden-download or durable transcript authority.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact 05b31b62/a296cfea bytes after independent/UI Design review. Planning bound only existing owner, acceptance, semantic and review paths without changing the 35 paths.

nonBlockingRisks: PIGE-CAP-003/E2.04 remain planned until publication/full exit acceptance; candidate evidence does not promote a Requirement, Exit or Phase.
Persisted dictation-language selection and explicit language-asset installation remain open; speech never installs assets implicitly.
macOS x64, Windows/Linux speech, Developer ID, hardened runtime, entitlements, notarization/staple and public trust remain unclaimed.
The separate Welcome/system-locale/Models/Vault onboarding request is excluded.
